trans-unit.source: You are using the Live Demo.
trans-unit.target: ライブデモを利用しています。

trans-unit.source: The risk of loss in trading can be substantial. It is not advisable to invest money you may need in the short term.
trans-unit.target: 取引に伴う損失のリスクは非常に大きくなる可能性があります。短期的に必要となる可能性のある資金を投資することはお勧めしません。

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to revoke this granted access?
trans-unit.target: 付与したアクセス権を取り消してもよろしいですか？

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete this account?
trans-unit.target: このアカウントを削除してもよろしいですか？

trans-unit.source: and is driven by the efforts of its contributors
trans-unit.target: そして、コントリビューターたちの努力によって推進されています
スタックトレースを表示

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete this asset profile?
trans-unit.target: この資産プロファイルを削除してもよろしいですか？
サブスクリプション履歴

trans-unit.target: エラー。過去データを解析できませんでした。

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete this tag?
trans-unit.target: このタグを削除してもよろしいですか？

1日あたりのエンゲージメント
ユーザーになりすます
フォームを検証できませんでした
おっと！セキュリティトークンが正しくありません。
アクティビティを管理

trans-unit.source: Ready to take control of your personal finances?
trans-unit.target: 個人の財務を管理する準備はできていますか？

trans-unit.source: The source code is fully available as open source software (OSS) under the AGPL-3.0 license
trans-unit.target: ソースコードはオープンソースソフトウェア（OSS）としてAGPL-3.0ライセンスの下で完全に公開されています
アカウントを設定する

trans-unit.source: Get a comprehensive financial overview by adding your bank and brokerage accounts.
trans-unit.target: 銀行口座や証券口座を追加して、包括的な財務概要を取得してください。

trans-unit.source: Record your investment activities to keep your portfolio up to date.
trans-unit.target: 投資活動を記録して、ポートフォリオを最新の状態に保ちましょう。
ポートフォリオを監視・分析する

trans-unit.source: Track your progress in real-time with comprehensive analysis and insights.
trans-unit.target: 包括的な分析とインサイトを使って、リアルタイムで進捗を追跡しましょう。
アカウントを設定する
アクティビティを追加
セキュリティトークン
ログイン状態を維持する
絶対グロス・パフォーマンス
実質純パフォーマンス
年率換算パフォーマンス

trans-unit.source: Please set the amount of your emergency fund.
trans-unit.target: 緊急用資金の金額を設定してください。
データグリッチの報告

trans-unit.source: Are you an ambitious investor who needs the full picture?
trans-unit.target: 全体像を必要とする野心的な投資家ですか？

trans-unit.source: Upgrade to Ghostfolio Premium today and gain access to exclusive features to enhance your investment experience:
trans-unit.target: 今すぐGhostfolio Premiumにアップグレードして、投資体験を向上させる独自機能にアクセスしましょう：

プロフェッショナルデータプロバイダー

trans-unit.source: Get the tools to effectively manage your finances and refine your personal investment strategy.
trans-unit.target: 財務を効果的に管理し、個人の投資戦略を洗練させるためのツールを入手しましょう。
アップグレードプラン

trans-unit.target: このサインイン方法を本当に削除しますか？

trans-unit.source: Protection for sensitive information like absolute performances and quantity values
trans-unit.target: 絶対パフォーマンスや数量などの機密情報の保護

trans-unit.target: これはに増加すると予測されています

trans-unit.target: おっと、現金残高の振替に失敗しました。

スクレイパー設定を解析できませんでした

trans-unit.source: Discover the latest Ghostfolio updates and insights on personal finance
trans-unit.target: 最新のGhostfolioアップデートと個人財務に関するインサイトを発見する

trans-unit.source: As you are already logged in, you cannot access the demo account.
trans-unit.target: すでにログインしているため、デモアカウントにアクセスできません。

trans-unit.source: Check out the numerous features of Ghostfolio to manage your wealth
trans-unit.target: あなたの資産を管理するためのGhostfolioの多数の機能をチェックする
インポートとエクスポート
オープンソースソフトウェア

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio is a personal finance dashboard to keep track of your net worth including cash, stocks, ETFs and cryptocurrencies across multiple platforms.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioは、現金、株式、ETF、暗号通貨など、複数のプラットフォームにわたる純資産を追跡するための個人財務ダッシュボードです。

trans-unit.source: app, asset, cryptocurrency, dashboard, etf, finance, management, performance, portfolio, software, stock, trading, wealth, web3
trans-unit.target: アプリ、資産、暗号通貨、ダッシュボード、etf、財務、管理、パフォーマンス、ポートフォリオ、ソフトウェア、株式、取引、資産、web3
オープンソース資産管理ソフトウェア

trans-unit.source: Manage your wealth like a boss
trans-unit.target: プロのように資産を管理する

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio is a privacy-first, open source dashboard for your personal finances. Break down your asset allocation, know your net worth and make solid, data-driven investment decisions.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioは、プライバシーを最優先した個人資産管理用のオープンソース・ダッシュボードです。資産配分を詳細に把握し、純資産を可視化することで、データに基づいた確実な投資判断を行えます。
月間アクティブユーザー

trans-unit.source: Protect your assets. Refine your personal investment strategy.
trans-unit.target: あなたの資産を守る。個人の投資戦略を洗練させる。

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio empowers busy people to keep track of stocks, ETFs or cryptocurrencies without being tracked.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioは、追跡されることなく株式、ETF、暗号通貨を管理できる、忙しい人々のためのツールです。

trans-unit.source: Get the full picture of your personal finances across multiple platforms.
trans-unit.target: 複数のプラットフォームにわたる個人財務の全体像を把握しましょう。

trans-unit.source: Use Ghostfolio anonymously and own your financial data.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioを匿名で使用し、財務データを自分のものにしましょう。

trans-unit.source: Benefit from continuous improvements through a strong community.
trans-unit.target: 強力なコミュニティによる継続的な改善の恩恵を受けましょう。

trans-unit.source: Get access to 80'000+ tickers from over 50 exchanges
trans-unit.target: 50以上の取引所から80,000以上のティッカーにアクセスできます

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio is for you if you are...
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioは、あなたが…であるなら、あなたのためのものです

trans-unit.source: trading stocks, ETFs or cryptocurrencies on multiple platforms
trans-unit.target: 複数のプラットフォームで株式、ETF、または暗号資産を取引すること
購入し保有する戦略を追求している

trans-unit.source: interested in getting insights of your portfolio composition
trans-unit.target: あなたのポートフォリオ構成の洞察を得ることに興味
プライバシーとデータの所有権を尊重すること

trans-unit.source: caring about diversifying your financial resources
trans-unit.target: 資金源の多様化を重視すること
スプレッドシートに年はノーと言う
まだこのリストを読んでいる

trans-unit.source: Oops! Could not delete the asset profiles.
trans-unit.target: おっと！資産プロファイルを削除できませんでした。
私たちのユーザーが言っていること

trans-unit.source: Members from around the globe are using Ghostfolio Premium
trans-unit.target: 世界中のメンバーがGhostfolio Premiumを使っています
Ghostfolioはどのように機能しますか？

trans-unit.source: * no e-mail address nor credit card required
trans-unit.target: *メールアドレスもクレジットカードも不要

trans-unit.source: Add any of your historical transactions
trans-unit.target: あなたの過去の取引のいずれかを追加

trans-unit.source: Get valuable insights of your portfolio composition
trans-unit.target: ポートフォリオ構成についての賫重なインサイトを得る
あなたは準備できていますか？

trans-unit.source: At Ghostfolio, transparency is at the core of our values. We publish the source code as open source software (OSS) under the AGPL-3.0 license and we openly share aggregated key metrics of the platform's operational status.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioでは、透明性が私たちの価値観の中核です。ソースコードをオープンソースソフトウェア（OSS）としてAGPL-3.0ライセンスの下で公開し、プラットフォームの運用状況の集計主要指標を公然と共有しています。
大学のメールアドレスで

trans-unit.source: and a safe withdrawal rate (SWR) of
trans-unit.target: および安全な引き出し率（SWR）の
Slackコミュニティのユーザー
GitHubのコントリビューター

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete these activities?
trans-unit.target: 本当にこれらのアクティビティを削除したいですか？
アクティビティを更新
株式、ETF、債券、暗号通貨、商品
一度きりの料金、年間口座手数料
お金を貸し出すための収入
住宅ローン、個人ローン、クレジットカード

trans-unit.source: Luxury items, real estate, private companies
trans-unit.target: 贅沢品、不動産、未公開企業
アクティビティをインポート
データをインポート中...
インポートが完了しました

trans-unit.source: Choose or drop a file here
trans-unit.target: ここでファイルを選択またはドロップ

trans-unit.source: The following file formats are supported:
trans-unit.target: 以下のファイル形式がサポートされています：
アクティビティを選択
最新のアクティビティ
学生割引をお探しですか？

trans-unit.source: Our official Ghostfolio Premium cloud offering is the easiest way to get started. Due to the time it saves, this will be the best option for most people. Revenue is used to cover operational costs for the hosting infrastructure and professional data providers, and to fund ongoing development.
trans-unit.target: 私たちの公式のGhostfolio Premiumクラウドオファリングは、始めるための最も簡単な方法です。それが節約する時間により、これはほとんどの人にとって最良の選択肢となります。収益は、ホスティングインフラストラクチャとプロフェッショナルなデータプロバイダーの運用コストをカバーするため、および継続的な開発に資金を提供するために使用されます。

trans-unit.source: If you prefer to run Ghostfolio on your own infrastructure, please find the source code and further instructions on GitHub.
trans-unit.target: もしあなたがGhostfolioを自分自身のインフラストラクチャで実行することを好むなら、ソースコードとさらなる指示を以下で見つけてくださいGitHubでソースコードと詳細な手順をご確認ください。

trans-unit.source: For tech-savvy investors who prefer to run Ghostfolio on their own infrastructure.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioを自身のインフラで運用することを好む、技術に精通した投資家向け。
無制限のトランザクション
ポートフォリオパフォーマンス
データのインポートとエクスポート
コミュニティサポート
セルフホスト、手動で更新。

trans-unit.source: For new investors who are just getting started with trading.
trans-unit.target: 取引を始めたばかりの新しい投資家のために。
完全マネージドのGhostfolioクラウドサービス。

trans-unit.source: For ambitious investors who need the full picture of their financial assets.
trans-unit.target: 自分の金融資産の全体像を必要とする意欲的な投資家のために。
メールおよびチャットサポート
一度きりの支払い、自動更新なし。
資産プロフィールを保存できませんでした

trans-unit.source: Hello, has shared a Portfolio with you!
trans-unit.target: こんにちは、があなたとポートフォリオを共有しました！
持続可能な老後の収入

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio empowers you to keep track of your wealth.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioはあなたが自分の富を追跡し続けることを可能にします。
クリップボードにコピー

trans-unit.source: Discover Open Source Alternatives for Personal Finance Tools
trans-unit.target: 個人財務ツールのオープンソース代替を発見する

trans-unit.source: This overview page features a curated collection of personal finance tools compared to the open source alternative Ghostfolio. If you value transparency, data privacy, and community collaboration, Ghostfolio provides an excellent opportunity to take control of your financial management.
trans-unit.target: この概要ページは、オープンソースの代替品Ghostfolioと比較した個人金融ツールの厳選されたコレクションを特集しています。もしあなたが透明性、データプライバシー、コミュニティコラボレーションを重視するなら、Ghostfolioはあなたの財務管理をコントロールする優れた機会を提供します。

trans-unit.source: Explore the links below to compare a variety of personal finance tools with Ghostfolio.
trans-unit.target: 以下のリンクを探索して、さまざまな個人金融ツールをGhostfolioと比較してください。
オープンソースの代替品
のオープンソース代替

trans-unit.source: Are you looking for an open source alternative to ? Ghostfolio is a powerful portfolio management tool that provides individuals with a comprehensive platform to track, analyze, and optimize their investments. Whether you are an experienced investor or just starting out, Ghostfolio offers an intuitive user interface and a wide range of functionalities to help you make informed decisions and take control of your financial future.
trans-unit.target: あなたはのオープンソースの代替品をお探しですか？Ghostfolioは、個人に投資を追跡、分析、最適化するための包括的なプラットフォームを提供する強力なポートフォリオ管理ツールです。あなたが経験豊富な投資家であろうと、始めたばかりであろうと、Ghostfolioは直感的なユーザーインターフェースと、情報に基づいた意思決定を行い、あなたの財務的な未来をコントロールするのを助けるための幅広い機能性を提供します。

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio is an open source software (OSS), providing a cost-effective alternative to making it particularly suitable for individuals on a tight budget, such as those pursuing Financial Independence, Retire Early (FIRE). By leveraging the collective efforts of a community of developers and personal finance enthusiasts, Ghostfolio continuously enhances its capabilities, security, and user experience.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioはオープンソースソフトウェア（OSS）であり、へのコスト効率の良い代替品を提供し、経済的独立と早期退職（FIRE）を追求する人々のような予算が限られた個人に特に適したものにします。開発者と個人金融愛好家のコミュニティの集団的な努力を活用することによって、Ghostfolioはその機能、セキュリティ、ユーザーエクスペリエンスを継続的に強化します。

trans-unit.source: Let's dive deeper into the detailed Ghostfolio vs comparison table below to gain a thorough understanding of how Ghostfolio positions itself relative to . We will explore various aspects such as features, data privacy, pricing, and more, allowing you to make a well-informed choice for your personal requirements.
trans-unit.target: 以下のGhostfolio vs の詳細比較表を読み込んで、Ghostfolioがに対してどのように位置づけられているかを徹底的に理解しましょう。機能、データプライバシー、料金などの様々な角度から検討し、必要に応じた選択を行いましょう。

trans-unit.source: Please note that the information provided in the Ghostfolio vs comparison table is based on our independent research and analysis. This website is not affiliated with or any other product mentioned in the comparison. As the landscape of personal finance tools evolves, it is essential to verify any specific details or changes directly from the respective product page. Data needs a refresh? Help us maintain accurate data on GitHub.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolio対比較表で提供されている情報は、私たちの独立した研究と分析に基づいていることに注意してください。このウェブサイトはまたは比較で言及されている他の製品と提携していません。個人金融ツールの状況が進化するにつれて、それぞれの製品ページから直接、特定の詳細または変更を確認することが不可欠です。データが更新を必要としていますか？GitHubで正確なデータを維持するのを手伝ってください。

trans-unit.source: Ready to take your investments to the next level?
trans-unit.target: あなたの投資を次のレベルに引き上げる準備はできていますか？

trans-unit.source: Effortlessly track, analyze, and visualize your wealth with Ghostfolio.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolioで、あなたの富を楽々と追跡、分析、可視化してください。
おっと、認証に失敗しました。

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete this account balance?
trans-unit.target: この口座残高を本当に削除しますか？

ドラフトをICSとしてエクスポート
ドラフトをICSとしてエクスポート

ポートフォリオフィルター
全時間最高値からの変動
{VAR_PLURAL, plural, =1 {プロフィール} other {プロフィール}}

Ghostfolio Premiumに簡単に切り替える
このアクティビティは既に存在します。
プライベートエクイティ

trans-unit.source: If you retire today, you would be able to withdraw
trans-unit.target: もしあなたが今日退職するなら、あなたは引き出すことができるでしょう

trans-unit.target: もし翻訳がない場合は、それを拡張するためにここで私たちを支援してください。
おっと！アクセスを許可できませんでした。

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio is a lightweight wealth management application for individuals to keep track of stocks, ETFs or cryptocurrencies and make solid, data-driven investment decisions.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolio is a lightweight wealth management application for individuals to keep track of stocks, ETFs or cryptocurrencies and make solid, data-driven investment decisions.

trans-unit.source: to use our referral link and get a Ghostfolio Premium membership for one year
trans-unit.target: to use our referral link and get a Ghostfolio Premium membership for one year

trans-unit.source: Oops! Could not find any assets.
trans-unit.target: Oops! Could not find any assets.

trans-unit.source: Get access to 80’000+ tickers from over 50 exchanges
trans-unit.target: Get access to 80’000+ tickers from over 50 exchanges

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio X-ray uses static analysis to uncover potential issues and risks in your portfolio. Adjust the rules below and set custom thresholds to align with your personal investment strategy.
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolio X-ray uses static analysis to uncover potential issues and risks in your portfolio. Adjust the rules below and set custom thresholds to align with your personal investment strategy.

trans-unit.source: Please enter your Ghostfolio API key:
trans-unit.target: Please enter your Ghostfolio API key:

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete the API key?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to delete the API key?

trans-unit.source: Generate Ghostfolio Premium Data Provider API key for self-hosted environments...
trans-unit.target: Generate Ghostfolio Premium Data Provider API key for self-hosted environments...

trans-unit.source: Could not generate an API key
trans-unit.target: Could not generate an API key

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to generate a new API key?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to generate a new API key?

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio Premium Data Provider API Key
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolio Premium Data Provider API Key

trans-unit.source: Set this API key in your self-hosted environment:
trans-unit.target: Set this API key in your self-hosted environment:

trans-unit.source: Please enter your Ghostfolio API key.
trans-unit.target: Please enter your Ghostfolio API key.

trans-unit.source: AI prompt has been copied to the clipboard
trans-unit.target: AI prompt has been copied to the clipboard

trans-unit.source: Link has been copied to the clipboard
trans-unit.target: Link has been copied to the clipboard

trans-unit.source: The project has been initiated by
trans-unit.target: The project has been initiated by

trans-unit.source: Copy AI prompt to clipboard for analysis
trans-unit.target: Copy AI prompt to clipboard for analysis

trans-unit.source: Copy portfolio data to clipboard for AI prompt
trans-unit.target: Copy portfolio data to clipboard for AI prompt

trans-unit.source: I understand that if I lose my security token, I cannot recover my account
trans-unit.target: I understand that if I lose my security token, I cannot recover my account

trans-unit.source: Please keep your security token safe. If you lose it, you will not be able to recover your account.
trans-unit.target: Please keep your security token safe. If you lose it, you will not be able to recover your account.

trans-unit.source: Here is your security token. It is only visible once, please store and keep it in a safe place.
trans-unit.target: Here is your security token. It is only visible once, please store and keep it in a safe place.

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to generate a new security token for this user?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to generate a new security token for this user?

trans-unit.source: and I agree to the Terms of Service.
trans-unit.target: and I agree to the Terms of Service.

trans-unit.source: An error occurred while updating to ().
trans-unit.target: An error occurred while updating to ().

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to delete this item?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to delete this item?

trans-unit.source: Calculations are based on delayed market data and may not be displayed in real-time.
trans-unit.target: Calculations are based on delayed market data and may not be displayed in real-time.

trans-unit.source: Demo user account has been synced.
trans-unit.target: Demo user account has been synced.

trans-unit.source: No emergency fund has been set up
trans-unit.target: No emergency fund has been set up

trans-unit.source: An emergency fund has been set up
trans-unit.target: An emergency fund has been set up

trans-unit.source: The fees do exceed ${thresholdMax}% of your total investment volume (${feeRatio}%)
trans-unit.target: The fees do exceed ${thresholdMax}% of your total investment volume (${feeRatio}%)

trans-unit.source: The fees do not exceed ${thresholdMax}% of your total investment volume (${feeRatio}%)
trans-unit.target: The fees do not exceed ${thresholdMax}% of your total investment volume (${feeRatio}%)

trans-unit.source: Your net worth is managed by a single account
trans-unit.target: Your net worth is managed by a single account

trans-unit.source: Your net worth is managed by ${accountsLength} accounts
trans-unit.target: Your net worth is managed by ${accountsLength} accounts

trans-unit.source: Fuel your self-hosted Ghostfolio with a powerful data provider to access 80,000+ tickers from over 50 exchanges worldwide.
trans-unit.target: Fuel your self-hosted Ghostfolio with a powerful data provider to access 80,000+ tickers from over 50 exchanges worldwide.

trans-unit.source: Over ${thresholdMax}% of your current investment is at ${maxAccountName} (${maxInvestmentRatio}%)
trans-unit.target: Over ${thresholdMax}% of your current investment is at ${maxAccountName} (${maxInvestmentRatio}%)

trans-unit.source: The major part of your current investment is at ${maxAccountName} (${maxInvestmentRatio}%) and does not exceed ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The major part of your current investment is at ${maxAccountName} (${maxInvestmentRatio}%) and does not exceed ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The equity contribution of your current investment (${equityValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The equity contribution of your current investment (${equityValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The equity contribution of your current investment (${equityValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%
trans-unit.target: The equity contribution of your current investment (${equityValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%

trans-unit.source: The equity contribution of your current investment (${equityValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The equity contribution of your current investment (${equityValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The fixed income contribution of your current investment (${fixedIncomeValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The fixed income contribution of your current investment (${fixedIncomeValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The fixed income contribution of your current investment (${fixedIncomeValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%
trans-unit.target: The fixed income contribution of your current investment (${fixedIncomeValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%

trans-unit.source: The fixed income contribution of your current investment (${fixedIncomeValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The fixed income contribution of your current investment (${fixedIncomeValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The major part of your current investment is not in your base currency (${baseCurrencyValueRatio}% in ${baseCurrency})
trans-unit.target: The major part of your current investment is not in your base currency (${baseCurrencyValueRatio}% in ${baseCurrency})

trans-unit.source: The major part of your current investment is in your base currency (${baseCurrencyValueRatio}% in ${baseCurrency})
trans-unit.target: The major part of your current investment is in your base currency (${baseCurrencyValueRatio}% in ${baseCurrency})

trans-unit.source: Over ${thresholdMax}% of your current investment is in ${currency} (${maxValueRatio}%)
trans-unit.target: Over ${thresholdMax}% of your current investment is in ${currency} (${maxValueRatio}%)

trans-unit.source: The major part of your current investment is in ${currency} (${maxValueRatio}%) and does not exceed ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The major part of your current investment is in ${currency} (${maxValueRatio}%) and does not exceed ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: If you encounter a bug, would like to suggest an improvement or a new feature, please join the Ghostfolio Slack community, post to @ghostfolio_
trans-unit.target: If you encounter a bug, would like to suggest an improvement or a new feature, please join the Ghostfolio Slack community, post to @ghostfolio_

trans-unit.source: Do you really want to generate a new security token?
trans-unit.target: Do you really want to generate a new security token?

trans-unit.source: The developed markets contribution of your current investment (${developedMarketsValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The developed markets contribution of your current investment (${developedMarketsValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The developed markets contribution of your current investment (${developedMarketsValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%
trans-unit.target: The developed markets contribution of your current investment (${developedMarketsValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%

trans-unit.source: The developed markets contribution of your current investment (${developedMarketsValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The developed markets contribution of your current investment (${developedMarketsValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The emerging markets contribution of your current investment (${emergingMarketsValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The emerging markets contribution of your current investment (${emergingMarketsValueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: The emerging markets contribution of your current investment (${emergingMarketsValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%
trans-unit.target: The emerging markets contribution of your current investment (${emergingMarketsValueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%

trans-unit.source: The emerging markets contribution of your current investment (${emergingMarketsValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The emerging markets contribution of your current investment (${emergingMarketsValueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: No accounts have been set up
trans-unit.target: No accounts have been set up

trans-unit.source: Your net worth is managed by 0 accounts
trans-unit.target: Your net worth is managed by 0 accounts

trans-unit.source: The Asia-Pacific market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%
trans-unit.target: The Asia-Pacific market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.target: The Asia-Pacific market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%

trans-unit.target: The Emerging Markets contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.target: The Emerging Markets contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.target: The Europe market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.target: The Europe market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%

trans-unit.target: The Europe market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) is within the range of ${thresholdMin}% and ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.target: The Japan market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.target: The Japan market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) is below ${thresholdMin}%

trans-unit.target: The North America market contribution of your current investment (${valueRatio}%) exceeds ${thresholdMax}%

trans-unit.source: Ghostfolio is an independent & bootstrapped business
trans-unit.target: Ghostfolio is an independent & bootstrapped business
